description: SAP customer, material, and order data to Salesforce. Inbound from SAP via IDoc, RFC, or OData.
criticalRules: Strip leading zeros from SAP customer numbers for human-readable Salesforce values: '0000001234' → '1234'
Strip leading zeros from SAP material numbers before mapping to Product Name
SAP dates are YYYYMMDD — convert to yyyy-MM-dd for Salesforce Date fields
SAP amounts are strings in some RFC responses — always cast to Number
Always set external ID field (SAP_Customer_Number__c) for upsert idempotency
SAP BAPI responses wrap data in tables — access as payload.CUSTOMER_LIST
Empty string in SAP = no value — treat as null in Salesforce

keyMappings.SAP_Customer_Number__c: KNNUR (stripped of leading zeros, external ID)
keyMappings.Name: NAME1 (max 80 chars in Salesforce)

dateConversion: fun fromSAPDate(d) = if (d != null and d != '' and d != '00000000') (d as Date {format: 'yyyyMMdd'}) as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'} else null
stripLeadingZeros: fun stripZeros(s) = if (s != null) (s as Number as String) else null
commonFailures: Duplicate accounts: external ID not set or field not marked as External ID in Salesforce
Date field null: '00000000' not treated as null — add specific check
Name truncation: SAP NAME1 can be longer than Salesforce 80-char limit
Amount type error: SAP sends numeric strings — always cast to Number
